debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
A : Set α
hA : A ∈ ↑𝓒
B : Set α
hB : B ∈ ↑𝓒
hAB :
  Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff A (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B)) = Subtype.val '' (Subtype.val ⁻¹' symmDiff B (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B))
this : symmDiff (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) (⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B) = (⋃ A ∈ 𝓒, A) \ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B
⊢ A = B

failed_attempts:
rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  simp only [Set.inter_symmDiff_distrib_left, Set.inter_diff_self, symmDiff_bot] at hAB
  rw [Set.inter_comm, Set.inter_comm _ B] at hAB
  simp only [Set.inter_sdiff_left_comm,
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hA),
    Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left (Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hB)] at hAB
  exact (Set.sdiff_inj (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA) (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hB)).1 hAB

simp only [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  have h_sub (D) (hD : D ∈ 𝓒) : (D ∆ ⋂ C ∈ 𝓒, C) ⊆ (⋃ C ∈ 𝓒, C) \ ⋂ C ∈ 𝓒, C := by
    rw [symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hD), Set.diff_subset_diff_iff_right]
    exact Set.subset_biUnion_of_mem hD
  rw [Set.inter_eq_left.2 (h_sub _ hA), Set.inter_eq_left.2 (h_sub _ hB)] at hAB
  exact symmDiff_right_inj.1 hAB

rw [Set.image_preimage_eq_inter_range, Subtype.range_val] at hAB
  rw [symmDiff_of_ge (Set.biInter_subset_of_mem hA),
